ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data point */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-14, 15-24, 25-34) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" REAL /* Population value for the given age group and year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity (e.g., Asian, African, European) */,
  "migration_status" TEXT /* Migration status (e.g., in-migration, out-migration, both) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., census, survey, administrative record) */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (0-1) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., population growth rate) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity (e.g., Asian, African, European) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the visualization */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the visualization */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups the visualization is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population forecast */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the forecast */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast (e.g., projected population) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for forecasting */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
